title: habenaria ensifolia var. khasiensis
intro: Habenaria ensifolia var. khasiensis, also known as a type of orchid, is a plant species that belongs to the orchid family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Habenaria ensifolia var. khasiensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas or decoctions, and its roots are also used to make powders and capsules for medicinal purposes.
